title: mls: add_member does not verify key package credential matches expected pub_id
description: In mls.rs::add_member_to_group, the admin accepts any key package bytes returned by the relay without checking that the BasicCredential inside the key package matches the target peer's pub_id. A compromised relay could return a key package for identity B when the admin requested identity A (via GetKeyPackage with pub_id=A). The admin would add B to the MLS group while the application believes A was added. This is a relay-assisted identity substitution attack. The fix is to extract the credential from the deserialized KeyPackageIn after validation and verify it equals pub_id.as_bytes() before calling group.add_members.
